buildCommand: cd web && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.datamuse.com https://api.dictionaryapi.dev https://vitals.vercel-insights.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; worker-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
